name: Deep-Dish Peach Pie
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup firmly packed light brown sugar
2 tablespoons butter, cut into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the pastry dough according to the recipe directions and refrigerate.
2. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
3. Place the peaches in an 8-inch square baking dish or 2-quart casserole.
4. In a small bowl, combine the flour, brown sugar, and nutmeg. Toss with the peaches until they are thoroughly coated.
5. Dot the mixture with butter.
6. On a lightly floured pastry cloth or board, roll out the pastry into a square or circle 1 inch larger than the baking dish.
7. Roll the pastry onto the rolling pin and gently drape it over the top of the dish.
8. Crimp the edges of the pastry and press around the top of the dish.
9. Brush the surface with an egg wash made by beating the egg yolk with the water.
10. Sprinkle with white sugar.
11. Using the tip of a sharp knife, cut 3 to 4 slits in the top of the pastry to allow steam to escape.
12. Bake for 35 to 40 minutes or until the crust is golden. Serve warm alongside vanilla ice cream or heavy cream.
